description: Compact LilyGo Screen-4.7-S3 flush side shell for a screen-to-PCB bonded stack, with PCB fixed by bottom screws through the rear cover.

key_dimensions.battery_pocket_clear_span: x -25.8..25.8, y -41.3..41.3; centered and clear of the verified screw bosses
key_dimensions.battery_door_design: centered sliding removable rear battery door with two upper insertion tongues, matching receiver pockets, a lower snap tooth, flex relief slots, and a fingernail notch
key_dimensions.battery_door_panel: 58.9 x 89.9 x 0.7, exported separately as battery_door.step/battery_door.stl
key_dimensions.battery_door_latching: insert upper tongues first, press lower edge until the snap tooth catches; pry at the fingernail notch to flex the lower tongue and open
key_dimensions.rear_vent_design: perimeter rear-cover vents removed because the centered battery-door side bands are too narrow; vents now sit on the removable battery door
key_dimensions.button_insert: separate three-button carrier exported as buttons.step/buttons.stl; retained by two main-body heat-stake posts through matching holes
key_dimensions.button_heat_stake_mounting: two 1.2 mm diameter posts grow from the inner side wall at the solid webs between the three button openings; the button strip has 1.55 mm clearance holes and is fixed by heat-melting the post tips after installation
key_dimensions.verified_h716_v24_pcb_hole_reference: PCB left-top origin, board_x along 120mm length, board_y along 66mm width

changes_from_v14: Removed all screen snap latches and discrete support pads.
Kept the top as a flush side-wall opening so the bonded screen face can sit level with the shell edge.
Changed rear cover PCB mounts to through holes with bottom screw head pockets.
Retained the compact 123 x 69 mm footprint and constrained side connector windows.
changes_from_verified_h716_hole_update: Replaced the previous symmetric PCB mount pattern with the verified H716 V2.4 mounting coordinates.
Converted PCB top-left coordinates into the centered CadQuery enclosure coordinate system.
changes_from_corner_and_battery_update: Reduced the screen/opening corner radius to 1.2 mm and the outer enclosure radius to 1.5 mm to match the very small real board corner radius.
Moved the battery retaining pocket center from y=18.0 mm to y=5.0 mm so the battery area avoids the fixed screw/boss positions.
changes_from_h716_side_io_update: Repositioned the three side-button openings, SD-card opening, and Type-C opening using the H716 V2.4 enclosure model as reference.
Removed the previous extra JST side opening.
Added a separate three-button insert with three proud caps, short stems, and an internal carrier strip.
changes_from_h716_side_io_verification: Moved Type-C from the short +Y end to the same +X long side as the buttons.
Moved the SD-card opening to the +X long side before the three-button cluster.
Verified the long-side order as SD, three buttons, then Type-C.
changes_from_h716_frm_direct_cutout_upda: Replaced semantic SD/Type-C/Button guesses with cutout boxes transferred directly from h716_032n_frm.stl.
Added one long-side slot and three bottom-open button notches on the -X side.
Added one wide opening and one small notch on the -Y end side.
changes_from_rear_vent_update: Added five rounded vertical through-slots on the left rear-cover area outside the battery pocket.
Added four short rounded horizontal through-slots near the upper and lower rear-cover edges for extra airflow.
Kept all rear ventilation slots clear of the battery retaining rails and verified PCB screw boss positions.
changes_from_centered_openable_battery_u: Moved the battery pocket center to the enclosure center at x=0.0, y=0.0.
Changed the rear cover into a centered openable battery bay with an outside shallow recess and a through opening.
Added a separate removable battery_door part with a locating plug, small latch ribs, fingernail notch, and battery retaining rails on its inside face.
Moved the rear ventilation slots to the perimeter around the battery door.
changes_from_vent_position_correction: Removed the narrow left/right perimeter vents that were squeezed beside the centered battery door.
Moved the ventilation pattern onto the removable battery door as a centered 3 x 5 rounded slot grille.
Kept the grille clear of the fingernail notch, latch ribs, and battery retaining rails.
changes_from_sliding_battery_door_update: Replaced the previous friction-style battery door with a sliding snap design.
Added two upper insertion tongues on the battery door and matching receiver pockets in the rear cover.
Added a lower snap tooth, a matching receiver pocket, and two flex relief slots so the fingernail notch can release the latch.
changes_from_heat_staked_button_update: Changed the side button strip from a glue-retained insert to a heat-staked insert.
Added two horizontal heat-stake posts to the main body inner side wall.
Added two matching clearance holes through the button carrier strip and slightly thickened the carrier for better heat-stake support.
changes_from_button_rear_cover_clearance: Raised the internal button carrier and heat-stake posts by 0.75 mm so the button strip clears the rear-cover lip.
Verified rear_cover/button_bar and rear_cover/main_body intersections are zero after the adjustment.
changes_from_button_heat_stake_position_: Moved the two heat-stake posts from the button-strip end areas into the solid webs between the three button openings.
New heat-stake y positions are 14.27 mm and 22.92 mm, centered between button_1/button_2 and button_2/button_3 cutouts.
Kept rear_cover/button_bar and rear_cover/main_body intersections at zero after the adjustment.
changes_from_button_motion_clearance_upd: Added local motion-clearance pockets behind the three side button openings so button stems no longer intersect the main body.
Verified main_body/button_bar, rear_cover/button_bar, and rear_cover/main_body intersection volumes are all zero.
assembly_note: Screen and PCB are assumed to be bonded first with thin 3M double-sided tape; the PCB screws define the stack position. Measure real stack height before printing if exact flushness is critical.
preview_note: preview.png was generated directly from STL because the local FreeCAD AppImage could not mount without FUSE.
